About

Results-obsessed.
Systems-minded.
AI-native.

I'm a Digital Marketing Strategist with 7+ years transforming organic channels into measurable revenue. My edge lies at the intersection of deep technical SEO craft and automation — building systems that work while you sleep.

From growing a Web3 company's organic sessions from under 2K to 18K+ over 18 months, to architecting a programmatic SEO engine that drove 3M+ impressions in a single month — I treat every brief as a systems problem, not a task list.

What sets me apart isn't just execution. It's the ability to connect search algorithms, AI search surfaces, business goals, and team operations into one coherent growth engine.

What Sets Me Apart
🤖
AI-Native SEO
AEO, GEO, LLM optimization & entity-first content — not trends I follow, but systems I've already shipped.
⚙️
Automation-First
n8n-powered SEO ops, reporting & experiment workflows — freeing the team for strategy, not spreadsheets.
📊
Business-Centric KPIs
Traffic → pipeline → revenue dashboards. I connect SEO to real business outcomes, not just rankings.
🚀
Startup DNA
Built full marketing functions as a team of one, then scaled them. I move fast, ship clean, thrive in ambiguity.

Experience

Where I've Built

Class Card LLP Jan 2025 – Mar 2026
Marketing Manager
SaaS AI Tools (voomo.ai) — Owned the entire organic growth engine from day zero
Drove 3M+ website impressions and a 30% increase in organic traffic within a single month — outpacing quarterly targets. Achieved 47% user growth (period-over-period) within 30 days.
  • Architected and executed a Programmatic SEO, AEO, and GEO strategy from scratch
  • Designed an n8n-powered automated content production and backlink acquisition system — scaled output 3× while cutting manual operations time by ~60%
  • Ran deep technical SEO audits (Screaming Frog + Ahrefs), resolving crawl errors and improving Core Web Vitals to 'Good' threshold across mobile and desktop
  • Structured content for answer engines — optimized for featured snippets, PAA boxes, and LLM knowledge graph inclusion, resulting in measurable zero-click brand visibility
  • Built full-funnel marketing strategy integrating SEO, email sequences (HubSpot), affiliate partnerships, and social channels to diversify traffic
  • Recruited, onboarded, and managed a 5-person marketing team; partnered with product to launch two product-led growth initiatives
  • Built Looker Studio dashboards shifting SEO reporting from keyword rankings to business impact metrics: traffic, leads, and MQLs
Appleute Ltd. May 2024 – Dec 2024
SEO Manager
B2B SaaS — Full-spectrum SEO overhaul to reverse declining organic traffic
Delivered a 40% increase in organic traffic within 6 months by redesigning site architecture, clearing technical debt, and executing a targeted content cluster strategy.
  • Conducted comprehensive keyword research and competitive gap analysis using SEMrush and Ahrefs, identifying 300+ untapped opportunities that became the editorial roadmap for Q3–Q4
  • Optimised on-page elements at scale — title tags, meta descriptions, schema markup, image compression, URL restructuring — improving CTR by ~18% MoM in Google Search Console
  • Managed a link-building programme targeting DA 50+ domains; secured 45+ high-quality backlinks through digital PR, content partnerships, and strategic outreach
  • Built acquisition, engagement, and conversion analytics dashboards in GA4 + Google Data Studio, enabling the leadership team to make faster, data-backed content investment decisions
QuillHash Technologies Jan 2022 – Apr 2024
Digital Marketing Manager
Blockchain / Web3 tech company — Built the digital marketing function from scratch
Grew monthly organic sessions from under 2K to 18K+ over 18 months through a multi-channel digital marketing strategy.
  • Performed advanced technical SEO audits quarterly; resolved JS rendering issues, duplicate content problems, and structured data errors — improving Ahrefs Site Health from 25 to 58
  • Created a content cluster framework targeting niche blockchain/Web3 keywords; published 60+ long-form articles attracting backlinks from DA 60+ domains (CoinTelegraph, Decrypt, Hackernoon)
  • Executed link-building campaigns using broken link building, resource page outreach, and HARO — generating 120+ referring domains over 2 years
  • Managed HubSpot marketing automation with drip email campaigns; grew LinkedIn company page to 6,000+ followers at 3–5% engagement rate
  • Mentored 3 junior marketers and 1 content writer; grew the LinkedIn page to 15K+ followers by the end of tenure
Neural Search Pvt. Ltd. (Neticode Tech) Jan 2020 – Mar 2021
Senior SEO Executive
Agency — Led technical SEO across 8 client websites simultaneously
  • Managed a team of 3 SEO analysts; introduced weekly sprint reviews and reporting templates that improved project delivery accuracy by 35%
  • Built customised link-building campaigns that improved domain authority for 3 clients from sub-20 DA to 35+ DA within 9 months
  • Delivered monthly SEO reports with clear business impact framing, achieving 100% client retention during tenure
Neticode Technologies Jan 2019 – Jan 2020
SEO Executive
Agency — Full-cycle SEO delivery across 12+ client projects
  • Executed keyword research, on-page optimisation, and technical SEO across a diverse portfolio of industries
  • Ran link-building campaigns including guest posts, directory submissions, and niche edits, contributing to domain authority growth for multiple clients
  • Supported senior SEO strategists with client reporting, audit documentation, and campaign tracking
